creator: freebsd@sysctl.cz
text:
Hi,
I read this problem about module2tuple and i have a problem with fetch module
I did make makesum.

https://forums.freebsd.org/threads/porting-grafana-tempo-oauth2adapt-go-module-fails-to-download.95531/

do you know how to fix this ?
===> License GPLv3 accepted by the user
===> filestash-0.4 depends on file: /usr/local/sbin/pkg - found
=> open-telemetry-opentelemetry-go-contrib-v0.52.0_GH0.tar.gz doesn't seem to exist in /usr/ports/distfiles/.
=> Attempting to fetch https://codeload.github.com/open-te...y-opentelemetry-go-contrib-v0.52.0_GH0.tar.gz
fetch: https://codeload.github.com/open-te...y-opentelemetry-go-contrib-v0.52.0_GH0.tar.gz: Not Found
=> Attempting to fetch http://distcache.freebsd.org/ports-...y-opentelemetry-go-contrib-v0.52.0_GH0.tar.gz
fetch: http://distcache.freebsd.org/ports-...y-opentelemetry-go-contrib-v0.52.0_GH0.tar.gz: Not Found
=> Couldn't fetch it - please try to retrieve this
=> port manually into /usr/ports/distfiles/ and try again.
*** Error code 1

Makefile is here: https://github.com/Martinfx/FreeBSD-Ports/blob/max-filestash/filestash/Makefile
